name: Sanction Scanner
description: AML sanctions, PEP, and adverse media screening API for fintechs and compliance teams.

seo.title: Sanction Scanner — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Sanction Scanner: AML sanctions, PEP, and adverse media screening API for fintechs and compliance teams.

when_to_use: Real-time OFAC, UN, EU sanctions screening API
PEP screening during customer onboarding for fintechs
Adverse media search API for enhanced due diligence
Batch screening workflow for existing customer remediation
Automated watchlist update sync for compliance teams

pros: Sanctions, PEP and adverse media in one API
Competitive pricing vs WorldCheck and Dow Jones
Quick integration with clear REST documentation
Solid fit for fintechs and payment startups
cons: Turkish origin raises procurement concerns for some
Adverse media coverage shallower than incumbents
Smaller brand for tier-1 bank audit committees
Case management tooling basic by comparison
review.verdict: Budget-friendly AML screening API with broad lists; fine for fintechs, not for tier-1 bank audits.
review.best_for: Fintechs and payments firms wanting low-cost AML screening with fast REST integration
review.not_for: Global banks whose auditors demand named tier-1 data providers like WorldCheck or Dow Jones
